calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-12-2011 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-12-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ellen Chaitin; Clerk: NBautista ; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Geoffrey Colburn, is present.
Plaintiff is in pro per.
Defendant, Undra Mitchell, is present.
Attorney, Jennifer Gould , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 503B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of JAN-18-2011 is vacated.
